title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Lupin

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Lupin
jsonLd.description:
Lupin has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Lupin:
Lupin is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lupin!
